2606.21222.title: FleetAgent: Teleoperation Assistant for Autonomous Fleets via Vectorized V2N Messages
2606.21222.paper_summary: Large-scale autonomous fleets rely on teleoperation to resolve rare failures, yet streaming raw sensor data from many vehicles is costly, and remote operators can only monitor a limited number of vehicles at a time. We introduce FleetAgent, a cloud-hosted multimodal large language model (MLLM) assistant that consumes compact vectorized vehicle-to-network (V2N) messages, such as map elements, detected objects, and the ego planned path. It provides a structured natural-language response (including narration, explanation, and evaluation of the plan and scene), along with an intervention urgency score for operator prioritization. To make structured messages compatible with token-based MLLMs, we propose VecFormer, a vector-to-embedding interface with differentiable top-K context selection that bounds context length and GPU KV-cache growth, enabling more efficient batch processing, which is important under the context of cloud-hosted large-scale fleet management. We also construct VecEval, a nuScenes-derived dataset with paired human and synthetic imperfect plans and human-verified language labels, to facilitate the training and evaluation of our proposed system. Our proposed system can reduce uplink payload by up to 625 times compared with raw images and reduce KV-cache memory by 16.54 times compared with original text descriptions. On VecEval, FleetAgent improves Lingo-Judge score by 16.8% and reduces intervention failure rate by 19.9%, compared with Qwen2.5-VL-7B using language descriptions. These results demonstrate that FleetAgent can utilize compact structured V2N messaging to enable efficient, explainable teleoperation monitoring for autonomous fleets.
2606.21222.paper_summary_zh: 大型自主艦隊依賴遙控操作來解決罕見的故障，但從許多車輛串流原始感測器數據的成本很高，且遠端操作員一次只能監控有限數量的車輛。我們介紹了 FleetAgent，一個雲端托管的多模態大型語言模型（MLLM）助手，能夠處理緊湊的向量化車輛對網絡（V2N）消息，例如地圖元素、檢測到的物體和自我計劃的路徑。它提供結構化的自然語言回應（包括敘述、解釋以及對計劃和場景的評估），並附有干預緊急程度分數以便操作員優先考量。為了使結構化消息與基於標記的 MLLMs 兼容，我們提出了 VecFormer，一個具有可微分的 top-K 上下文選擇的向量到嵌入接口，該接口限制了上下文長度和 GPU KV 緩存增長，使得批量處理更為高效，這在雲端托管的大型艦隊管理中至關重要。我們還構建了 VecEval，一個基於 nuScenes 的數據集，包含配對的人類和合成不完美計劃以及經人類驗證的語言標籤，以促進我們提議系統的訓練和評估。我們的提議系統可以將上行負載減少多達 625 倍，與原始圖像相比，並將 KV 緩存記憶體減少 16.54 倍，與原始文本描述相比。在 VecEval 上，FleetAgent 的 Lingo-Judge 分數提高了 16.8%，並將干預失敗率降低了 19.9%，與使用語言描述的 Qwen2.5-VL-7B 相比。這些結果表明，FleetAgent 能夠利用緊湊的結構化 V2N 消息來實現高效且可解釋的自主艦隊遙控監控。
2606.21222.author: Juntong Peng et.al.
2606.21222.authors: Juntong Peng, Qi Chen, Deyuan Qu, Takayuki Shimizu, Yaobin Chen, Ziran Wang
